About Me

Driven by code,
shaped by values

Hi! I'm Dilpreet Singh — a Computer Science Engineering student at NIELIT Ropar with a deep passion for technology, innovation, and building real-world solutions.

Recently, I competed in the 2-Day National Level Fintech Cybersecurity Hackathon at IIT Ropar (March 20–21, 2026), working on ML-based financial fraud detection models — building classification systems to detect phishing, account scams, and impersonation attacks in real-time.

My NCC training has built in me unmatched discipline and leadership, while NSS volunteer work keeps me connected to community-driven impact. On the court, Badminton sharpens my competitive mindset and focus.

🎯 Goal-oriented mindset
💡 Creative problem solver
🤝 Team collaborator
📚 Continuous learner
🚀 Innovation-driven
⚡ Fast executor

Projects

Things I've built

Real-world projects that showcase my technical skills and problem-solving ability.

PythonsklearnMLCybersecurity
Fintech Fraud Detection System

Built at IIT Ropar's National Fintech Cybersecurity Hackathon. ML classification model detecting phishing, account scams, and impersonation attacks on financial data. Used confusion matrix, precision/recall tuning and real-time scoring.

⭐ GitHub 🚀 Demo
🤖
PythonNLPSpeech APIAI
AI Voice Assistant

Intelligent voice-controlled assistant understanding natural language commands, fetching real-time info, and automating desktop tasks using Python NLP libraries and speech recognition APIs.

⭐ GitHub 🚀 Demo
⌨️
HTMLCSSJavaScript
Typing Speed Tester

Real-time typing speed test with WPM counter, accuracy tracking, difficulty modes, and leaderboard. Clean UI with instant visual feedback and animated results.

⭐ GitHub 🚀 Live
🌊
ReactNode.jsMongoDBWebSocket
LiveFlow Monitoring Tool

Real-time data monitoring dashboard with live charts, alerting system, and historical analytics. Built with WebSocket for sub-second updates and deployed on cloud infrastructure.

⭐ GitHub 🚀 Demo
🎓
PythonMySQLTkinter
Student Management System

Desktop app for managing student records, attendance, grades and analytics. Features role-based access for teachers and admins with PDF report generation.

⭐ GitHub 🚀 Demo

This premium portfolio — responsive, glassmorphism design, smooth animations, dark/light mode, real embedded photos, and full personal branding. Showcases authentic hackathon, NCC, and sports achievements.

Experience & Achievements

My Journey

March 20–21, 2026
Fintech Cybersecurity Hackathon — Participant
IIT Ropar × DSCI × NIELIT | National Level 2-Day Hackathon

Built an ML-based financial fraud detection system detecting phishing, account block scams, fake payment portals, and impersonation attacks. Implemented Python sklearn classifiers with precision/recall tuning and confusion matrix analysis in a live competition environment.

🏆 National Hackathon
March 9–10, 2026
Teachers Training in ICT & Digital Initiatives
NIELIT Ropar — SCERT Punjab Programme

Participated in a 2-day training programme at NIELIT Ropar's main campus for teachers and officials of SCERT Punjab, contributing to digital literacy and ICT integration in education.

📚 Workshop
2024
Web Development Bootcamp — Certification
Udemy / Self-paced

Completed intensive full-stack web development covering React, Node.js, Express, and MongoDB with multiple hands-on projects and final capstone.

📜 Certification
2023
College Coding Competition — 2nd Place
Department of CSE

Secured 2nd place in inter-department coding competition solving DSA problems under time pressure. Demonstrated strong algorithmic thinking and fast execution.

🥈 Achievement
2023
Cultural Performance — Bhangra & Folk Arts
College Cultural Festival

Leadership & Service

NCC & NSS — Beyond the Classroom

🎖️
National Cadet Corps
Discipline. Unity. Leadership. एकता और अनुशासन

As an active NCC Cadet, I have undergone rigorous military-inspired training that has fundamentally shaped my character. Parades, discipline camps, and leadership drills have trained me to perform under pressure — a quality that directly translates to high-stakes engineering environments and hackathon competitions.

Champion on the Court

Badminton — Trophy Winner 🏆

Competitive badminton player who has won trophies at the college and inter-college level. The explosive reflexes, strategic court positioning, and mental stamina required at competitive level mirror the demands of complex engineering and hackathon challenges under time pressure.
